_comment: Bone mapping for retargeting a Kimodo SOMA BVH (somaskel77 skeleton, exported with --bvh) onto the Shepa Jouer marshmallow rig. Source keys = SOMA joint names (as in the BVH hierarchy). Target values = our rig bones (assets/marshmallow_rigged.glb). Most names already match, so Rokoko auto-maps them.
notes: SOMA spine is Spine1/Spine2/Chest -> our Spine/Spine01/Spine02.
SOMA Neck1 -> our 'neck' (Neck2 ignored). Finger joints (Hand*1..) ignored — our rig has none.
Generate the BVH with: kimodo_gen "..." --model Kimodo-SOMA-RP-v1 --bvh --bvh_standard_tpose --output out
